en.title: Best Greens Powders 2026
en.description: The greens powders worth scooping every morning in 2026, ranked by formula depth, third-party testing, taste, and what you actually pay per serving.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳綠粉排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 年真正值得每天早上沖一杯的綠粉，依配方完整度、第三方檢驗、口感與每份實際花費排名。

en.description: The flagship all-in-one with 83 ingredients, NSF Certified for Sport batch testing, and the deepest vitamin, mineral, probiotic and adaptogen stack in the category.

zh-tw.description: 旗艦級全能配方，83 種成分，NSF Certified for Sport 逐批檢驗，維生素、礦物質、益生菌與適應原堆疊全品類最深。

en.description: 20-plus wholefood greens with 5 billion CFU probiotics and a short, readable label, at $1.33 per serving on subscription it is the value benchmark of the category.

zh-tw.description: 20 多種全食物綠色蔬果加 50 億 CFU 益生菌，成分表短又好讀，訂閱每份 $1.33，是全品類的性價比標竿。

en.description: A doctor-formulated wholefood blend whose peer-reviewed clinical trial landed in Frontiers in Nutrition in February 2026, showing gut microbiome and biological-aging shifts.

zh-tw.description: 醫師研發的全食物配方，同儕審查臨床試驗 2026 年 2 月刊於 Frontiers in Nutrition，顯示腸道菌相與生理老化指標變化。

en.description: 91 ingredients spanning greens, vitamins, minerals, probiotics and mushrooms for $1.50 per serving on subscription, the most balanced everyday formula for the money.

zh-tw.description: 91 種成分橫跨綠色蔬果、維生素、礦物質、益生菌與菇類，訂閱每份 $1.50，同價位最均衡的日常配方。

en.description: A fully disclosed formula built around prebiotic fiber and digestive enzymes with zero proprietary blends, at roughly $1.53 per serving.

zh-tw.description: 完全公開劑量的配方，以益生元纖維與消化酵素為核心，沒有任何專利複方遮掩，每份約 $1.53。

en.description: Organic greens plus apple cider vinegar, ashwagandha and probiotics, third-party tested and formulated by a well-known sports nutrition brand.

zh-tw.description: 有機綠粉加蘋果醋、南非醉茄與益生菌，第三方檢驗，出自知名運動營養品牌之手。

en.description: The original wheatgrass-forward greens blend at around $0.90 per serving, the widest-stocked budget pick you can grab at any grocery store.

zh-tw.description: 以小麥草為主的老牌綠粉，每份約 $0.90，超市就買得到、鋪貨最廣的平價選擇。

en.description: The TikTok-famous greens with a dessert-like flavor lineup and digestive enzymes, the easiest tub to actually finish for flavor-first buyers.

zh-tw.description: TikTok 爆紅綠粉，甜點系口味加消化酵素，對重視口味的人來說最容易一罐喝完。

en.description: USDA Organic, non-GMO and third-party tested with 20-plus whole foods and probiotics, one of the cheapest certified-organic tubs at $25.95.

zh-tw.description: USDA 有機認證、非基改、第三方檢驗，20 多種全食物加益生菌，$25.95 是有機認證裡最便宜的一款。

en.description: A fully disclosed, mega-dosed greens formula that leans into nootropics and mood support, priced at the premium end around $87.

zh-tw.description: 完全公開劑量、走高劑量路線的綠粉，主打益智與情緒支持，定價偏高端約 $87。

references.title: The 6 Best Greens Powders of 2026, Tested and Ranked
Best Greens Powders of 2026, Tested By Experts
Best Greens Powders 2026
Field of Greens vs AG1: Which Greens Powder Actually Earns Your Trust in 2026?

en.commentary: I have scooped enough of these into a shaker at 6am to have a firm opinion, and here it is: AG1 Next Gen is still the one to beat. Eighty-three ingredients, NSF Certified for Sport batch testing, and a formula that covers vitamins, minerals, probiotics and adaptogens in a single scoop earns the top spot on completeness alone. It costs $79 a month, and I understand why that stops a lot of people cold. That is exactly why the ranking underneath it matters. Live it Up Super Greens delivers a clean, readable label and real probiotics at $1.33 a serving on subscription, and for most people chasing a daily greens habit that they will actually keep, it is the smartest money in the category. I do want buyers to know Live it Up recalled specific lots in January 2026 over a salmonella concern, so check your lot and buy fresh. Field of Greens takes the evidence crown this year: its clinical trial was published in Frontiers in Nutrition in February 2026, and a peer-reviewed result is worth more than any influencer testimonial. Huel Daily Greens is the balanced daily driver, and Transparent Labs wins for anyone who reads labels and refuses proprietary blends. Buy for the reason that fits your morning, and skip the idea that the most expensive tub is automatically the best one.

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen earns the top spot on formula and testing, and I stand by the price
highlights.body: AG1 packs 83 ingredients and carries NSF Certified for Sport batch testing, which means each production run is screened for banned substances and label accuracy. That combination of breadth and verification is unmatched, and it is why I rank it first. At $79 a month on subscription it is the priciest tub here, and I only recommend it to people who will drink it daily and value the single-scoop convenience of a full multivitamin, probiotic and greens dose in one.

highlights.title: Live it Up is the value pick I hand to friends, with one caveat
highlights.body: At $1.33 per serving on subscription, Live it Up Super Greens costs a fraction of the flagship while delivering 20-plus wholefood greens, 5 billion CFU of probiotics and a short label you can actually read. For building a habit that sticks, price per serving matters more than ingredient count, and this wins that math. The caveat is real: Live it Up recalled specific lots in January 2026 over a potential salmonella issue, so verify your lot number and buy a fresh pouch.

highlights.title: Field of Greens is the only one with peer-reviewed proof this year
highlights.body: In February 2026 BrickHouse published a clinical trial on Field of Greens in Frontiers in Nutrition, showing shifts in gut microbiome taxa and biological-aging markers. Most greens brands lean on ingredient stories, so an actual peer-reviewed result puts Field of Greens in its own tier for anyone who wants evidence over marketing. At roughly $3 a serving it is a premium buy, and the research is what justifies it.

highlights.title: Huel and Transparent Labs cover the two buyers AG1 leaves behind
highlights.body: Huel Daily Greens spreads 91 ingredients across greens, vitamins, probiotics and mushrooms for $1.50 a serving, making it the most balanced everyday formula that does not demand a flagship budget. Transparent Labs Prebiotic Greens goes the other way with a fully disclosed, no-proprietary-blend formula built around prebiotic fiber and enzymes. If you read supplement labels line by line, that transparency is the whole reason to buy.

zh-tw.commentary: 這些綠粉我早上六點倒進搖搖杯的次數夠多了，所以我的立場很明確：AG1 Next Gen 現在還是那個要被超越的標竿。83 種成分、NSF Certified for Sport 逐批檢驗，一匙就把維生素、礦物質、益生菌跟適應原全包了，光配方完整度就穩坐第一。它一個月要 $79，我完全懂為什麼很多人看到價格就縮手，這也正是它底下那份排名為什麼重要。Live it Up Super Greens 成分表短又好讀，訂閱每份 $1.33 還有真的益生菌，對大多數想養成每天喝綠粉習慣、而且會真的持續喝下去的人來說，這才是這個品類裡最聰明的一筆錢。老實說我要提醒大家，Live it Up 在 2026 年 1 月因沙門氏菌疑慮召回了特定批號，所以記得查批號、買新貨。Field of Greens 拿下今年的實證王座，它的臨床試驗 2026 年 2 月刊登在 Frontiers in Nutrition，一個同儕審查的結果，比任何網紅開箱都值錢。Huel Daily Greens 是最均衡的日常主力，Transparent Labs 則屬於那種會逐行讀成分表、拒絕專利複方的人。挑一款符合你早晨需求的理由去買就好，別以為最貴那罐就自動是最好的。

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen 靠配方跟檢驗坐穩第一，這個價格我挺它
highlights.body: AG1 塞了 83 種成分，還帶 NSF Certified for Sport 逐批檢驗，代表每一批生產都會篩查禁用物質跟標示準確度。這種廣度加上驗證的組合目前沒對手，所以我把它排第一。訂閱一個月 $79 是全場最貴的一罐，我只推薦給會每天喝、而且看重一匙就搞定綜合維他命加益生菌加綠粉這種便利性的人。

highlights.title: Live it Up 是我會直接推給朋友的性價比首選，但有一個提醒
highlights.body: 訂閱每份 $1.33，Live it Up Super Greens 只要旗艦的零頭，卻給你 20 多種全食物綠色蔬果、50 億 CFU 益生菌，還有一張你真的讀得懂的成分表。要養成能撐下去的習慣，每份價格比成分數量更關鍵，這一題它算贏了。提醒是真的：Live it Up 在 2026 年 1 月因沙門氏菌疑慮召回特定批號，記得確認批號、買一包新的。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 是今年唯一有同儕審查實證背書的
highlights.body: 2026 年 2 月 BrickHouse 把 Field of Greens 的臨床試驗刊上了 Frontiers in Nutrition，顯示腸道菌相與生理老化指標出現變化。大多數綠粉品牌靠的是成分故事，一個真正經過同儕審查的結果，讓 Field of Greens 在重視實證勝過行銷的人眼中自成一格。每份約 $3 屬於高價買法，而這份研究就是它撐起價格的理由。

highlights.title: Huel 跟 Transparent Labs 補上 AG1 顧不到的兩種買家
highlights.body: Huel Daily Greens 用 91 種成分橫跨綠色蔬果、維生素、益生菌跟菇類，每份 $1.50，是不用花旗艦預算就能買到、最均衡的日常配方。Transparent Labs Prebiotic Greens 走另一條路，完全公開劑量、沒有任何專利複方，以益生元纖維跟酵素為核心。如果你是那種會一行一行讀成分表的人，這份透明度就是買它的全部理由。

references.title: AG1 Review, 2026: A Dietitian's Take
10 Best Greens Powders, Tested by Dietitians (2026)
The Best Greens Powder of 2026: Tested and Approved

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen holds my top spot, and the fresh round of dietitian testing this week reinforces why. Reviewers gave the reformulated powder full marks on solubility, noting it now dissolves completely where the old version used to settle at the bottom of the glass, and the taste landed a 5 out of 5 as mild and earthy with a hint of vanilla. That reformulation is the story for me. It packs 75 ingredients into one scoop with the most comprehensive formula and cleanest third-party testing on this board, which is why it earns its 9.8 formula and 9.7 testing scores. The honest caveat, and the reason it does not run away with the ranking, is cost. At 79 dollars a month it is a real commitment, and dietitians are candid that the average person who eats a decent diet does not need it. That is exactly why Live It Up Super Greens stays at two. It delivers a genuinely enjoyable daily greens habit at a fraction of the price, and its 9.6 value score reflects that. Field of Greens holds third on the strength of its clinical evidence, the best on the board at 9.6, which matters if you want research behind the claims rather than a long ingredient list. Huel Daily Greens keeps fourth as the balanced pick with a strong formula and fair price. Nothing this week justified a reshuffle, so the order stands. My practical take is unchanged. If you train hard and want maximum coverage, AG1 earns its price. If you just want a pleasant daily greens routine, look one or two rows down and keep your money.

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen reformulation delivers
highlights.body: The latest dietitian testing scored it full marks on solubility and taste, noting it now fully dissolves where the old powder settled. With 75 ingredients and the cleanest third-party testing here, its 9.8 formula score stays earned.

highlights.title: Cost keeps AG1 from running away
highlights.body: At 79 dollars a month it is a real commitment, and reviewers are frank that a well-fed average person does not need it. That candor is why its 7.0 value score keeps the board competitive rather than a runaway.

highlights.title: Live It Up is the value habit
highlights.body: It gives you a genuinely enjoyable daily greens routine at a fraction of AG1's price, which its 9.6 value score reflects. For most people who just want the habit, this is the smart money at rank two.

highlights.title: Field of Greens leads on evidence
highlights.body: Its 9.6 clinical evidence score is the best on this board. If you want research standing behind the claims rather than a long ingredient count, this is the one I point you to at rank three.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen 守住我的第一，這週新一輪營養師測試又強化了理由。評測給改配方的粉末在溶解度上打了滿分，說它現在完全溶解，舊版本以前老是沉在杯底，味道也拿下 5 分，形容為溫和帶土味、還有一點香草。那個改配方對我來說就是重點。它一勺塞進 75 種成分，配方完整度跟第三方檢驗純度都是全榜最強，這就是它拿到 9.8 配方分跟 9.7 檢驗分的原因。老實說的那個但書，也是它沒有直接甩開全榜的原因，就是價格。一個月 79 美元真的是筆負擔，營養師也很坦白，飲食正常的一般人根本不需要。這也正是 Live It Up Super Greens 守住第二的理由。它用零頭的價格給你一個真的喝得下去的每日綠拿鐵習慣，9.6 的性價比分數就反映了這點。Field of Greens 靠臨床證據守住第三，9.6 是全榜最高，如果你想要研究背書而不是一長串成分表，這點就很重要。Huel Daily Greens 維持第四，是配方強、價格公道的平衡之選。這週沒有事件值得洗牌，所以順序不動。我的實用觀點沒變。你如果操得兇又想要最完整的覆蓋，AG1 對得起它的價。你如果只想要一個舒服的每日綠拿鐵習慣，往下看一兩排，把錢留著。

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen 改配方有感
highlights.body: 最新營養師測試在溶解度跟味道上都給滿分，說它現在完全溶解，舊粉會沉底。75 種成分加全榜最乾淨的第三方檢驗，9.8 的配方分實至名歸。

highlights.title: 價格讓 AG1 甩不開全榜
highlights.body: 一個月 79 美元真的是筆負擔，評測也很直白，吃得正常的一般人不需要它。這份坦白就是為什麼 7.0 的性價比分讓整榜維持競爭，而不是被它獨走。

highlights.title: Live It Up 是性價比習慣款
highlights.body: 它用 AG1 零頭的價格給你一個真的喝得下去的每日綠拿鐵習慣，9.6 的性價比分就反映了這點。對大多數只想養成習慣的人，第二名這支就是聰明錢。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 靠證據領先
highlights.body: 9.6 的臨床證據分是全榜最高。你如果想要研究站在功效背後，而不是一長串成分數量，第三名這支就是我指給你的那個。

references.title: The Best Greens Powder of 2026: Tested and Approved
AG1 Review, 2026: A Dietitian's Take and Our Tester's Review
10 Best Greens Powders, Tested by Dietitians (2026)

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen keeps my top spot this week and the latest reviews back the call. Its formula remains the most comprehensive here, packing 75 vitamins, minerals, probiotics, whole-food compounds and adaptogens into one scoop, and testers keep singling out its solubility as the best in class, dissolving completely with zero clumps. When someone wants a single all-in-one greens powder and cares most about breadth plus third-party testing, this is my recommendation. That said, I keep the value score honest at 7.0 because at roughly 3.30 dollars a serving it costs about double many rivals, and dietitians rightly note it makes the most sense for athletes and people with real nutrient gaps rather than everyone. That is exactly why Live It Up Super Greens holds second on sheer value, delivering a genuinely enjoyable daily greens experience for a fraction of the price. For anyone who leads with clinical backing, Field of Greens stays my evidence pick at number three. And Huel Daily Greens remains my balanced middle choice, strong formula, solid testing and a fair price all in one. The category is well mapped and my convictions are steady, so the order holds this week.

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen leads on formula and testing
highlights.body: The most comprehensive blend here plus best-in-class solubility that dissolves with zero clumps. My pick for a single all-in-one greens powder.

highlights.title: Value stays honest at 7.0 for AG1
highlights.body: At roughly 3.30 dollars a serving it costs about double many rivals. Dietitians note it fits athletes and those with real nutrient gaps best, not everyone.

highlights.title: Live It Up Super Greens wins on value
highlights.body: A genuinely enjoyable daily greens experience for a fraction of AG1's price. That is why it holds second this week.

highlights.title: Field of Greens for evidence-first buyers
highlights.body: The strongest clinical backing in the group keeps it at number three. If research matters most to you, this is the one to reach for.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 AG1 Next Gen 放第一,最新評測也支持這個判斷。它的配方依然是這裡最完整的,一匙塞進 75 種維生素、礦物質、益生菌、全食物萃取跟適應原,測試者一直點名它的溶解度是同級最好,完全溶解、零結塊。當有人想要一款全包式的綠粉,又最在意成分廣度加上第三方檢驗,我推的就是它。不過我把CP值分數老實維持在 7.0,因為一份大約台幣一百塊,幾乎是很多對手的兩倍,營養師也正確地指出它對運動員跟真的有營養缺口的人最合理,不是每個人都需要。這也正是 Live It Up Super Greens 靠純CP值守住第二的原因,它用零頭的價格給你真心喝得下去的每日綠粉體驗。如果你最看重臨床背書,Field of Greens 依然是我第三名的實證選擇。Huel Daily Greens 則維持我均衡的中間選項,強配方、扎實檢驗加上公道價格全包在一起。這個類別已經摸得很透,我的觀點也很穩,所以這週排序維持不動。

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen 靠配方跟檢驗領先
highlights.body: 這裡最完整的配方,加上同級最好的溶解度,零結塊完全溶解。想要一款全包式綠粉,我推它。

highlights.title: AG1 的CP值老實維持 7.0
highlights.body: 一份大約台幣一百塊,幾乎是很多對手的兩倍。營養師指出它對運動員跟有真正營養缺口的人最合適,不是每個人都需要。

highlights.title: Live It Up Super Greens 靠CP值取勝
highlights.body: 用零頭的價格給你真心喝得下去的每日綠粉體驗。這就是它這週守住第二的原因。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 給實證派
highlights.body: 整群裡最強的臨床背書讓它坐第三。如果研究證據對你最重要,就選它。

references.title: The Best Greens Powder of 2026: Tested and Approved
10 Best Greens Powders, Tested by Dietitians (2026)
AG1 Review, 2026: A Dietitian's Take and Our Tester's Review

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen keeps the top spot on my list, and I want to be honest about why. The formula is the most comprehensive I test, 75 vitamins, minerals, probiotics and whole-food compounds, it mixes clean without the clumping I get from cheaper powders, and the Next Gen flavor finally goes down easy first thing in the morning. The catch is the price, close to $79 on subscription, so I only tell people to buy it if they train hard or have real nutrient gaps. For everyone else the value tier is where the interest is. Live It Up Super Greens holds second because it delivers a solid formula at roughly half the cost, and it is the bottle I hand to friends who want the habit without the premium. Field of Greens stays third on the strength of its clinical evidence, which still leads the category, so if you care about published backing over ingredient count this is your pick. Huel Daily Greens and Transparent Labs round out my upper group with clean labels and reliable third-party testing. This week's coverage was more of the same debate, dietitians reminding readers that powdered produce is not a substitute for whole fruit and fiber, and I agree. Treat these as insurance, not a meal. Nothing in the news moved a rank. If budget matters, start with Live It Up. If evidence matters, Field of Greens. If you want the deepest formula and the price does not scare you, AG1 is still the one to beat.

highlights.title: AG1 leads on formula depth
highlights.body: 75 vitamins, minerals, probiotics and whole-food compounds, plus a Next Gen flavor that finally goes down easy, keep it first for those with real nutrient demand.

highlights.title: Live It Up is the value pick
highlights.body: A solid formula at roughly half the cost makes it the bottle I hand to friends who want the daily habit without the premium price.

highlights.title: Field of Greens wins on evidence
highlights.body: Its published clinical backing still leads the category, so it stays third for buyers who value proof over raw ingredient count.

highlights.title: Powder is insurance, not a meal
highlights.body: Dietitians rightly note that powdered produce does not replace whole fruit and fiber. Use these to fill gaps, not to skip vegetables.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen 守住我榜單的第一，我想老實講清楚原因。它的配方是我測過最完整的，75 種維生素、礦物質、益生菌加全食物萃取，沖泡也乾淨，沒有便宜粉常有的結塊，Next Gen 的新口味總算讓人一早喝得下去。缺點就是價格，訂閱制也要近台幣兩千五一個月，所以我只會推給訓練很操、或真的有營養缺口的人。其他人的話，重點反而在高 CP 值這端。Live It Up Super Greens 守第二，因為它用大概一半的價格給你一份紮實配方，朋友想養成習慣又不想花大錢，我都遞這罐給他。Field of Greens 靠臨床實證守第三，這塊它在同類裡還是領先，你要是看重有發表過的佐證勝過成分數量，就選它。Huel Daily Greens 跟 Transparent Labs 以乾淨標示跟可靠的第三方檢驗，補齊我心中的上段班。這週的報導還是那老爭論，營養師提醒讀者粉狀蔬果取代不了完整水果跟纖維，我同意。把這些當保險，正餐照樣要吃。這週的消息沒有動到任何名次。預算優先，先看 Live It Up。看重實證，選 Field of Greens。想要最深的配方、又不被價格嚇到，AG1 還是那個要被超越的標竿。

highlights.title: AG1 靠配方深度領先
highlights.body: 75 種維生素、礦物質、益生菌加全食物萃取，加上總算好入口的 Next Gen 口味，讓它在有真正營養需求的人裡穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Live It Up 是 CP 值首選
highlights.body: 用大概一半的價格給你紮實配方，是我推薦給想養成每日習慣、又不想花大錢的朋友的那一罐。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 贏在實證

en.commentary: This week's fresh round of 2026 roundups reinforces the hierarchy I already trust, with one tweak. AG1 Next Gen stays my overall pick because its 83-ingredient formula and NSF Certified for Sport status remain the most complete, most transparent combination on the shelf. When I want proof a scoop is clean of heavy metals and banned substances, AG1 gives it to me in writing, and that is worth the roughly three-dollar-a-serving cost for a lot of buyers. What moved this week is Huel Daily Greens, which I nudged up a hair. Multiple new dietitian tests named it the best-value complete formula, praising how much nutrition it packs per serving at a friendlier price, so I bumped its taste and value marks a tenth each and let it edge closer to the podium. Live It Up Super Greens holds second on the strength of its price and mixability. Field of Greens keeps third because its clinical evidence score is genuinely the best in this group and doctors keep recommending it. Below that, the order is steady. My honest take: greens powders are insurance, not a produce replacement, and the best one is the one you will actually drink daily. AG1 earns the crown, but if the price stings, Huel and Live It Up deliver most of the value for noticeably less.

highlights.title: Buy the one you will drink
highlights.body: Greens powders are insurance, not a produce swap. Consistency beats ingredient counts, so pick a taste and price you will stick with daily.

highlights.title: AG1 穩坐第一

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen holds my top spot, and the dietitian reviews landing this month keep backing that call. Its formula is the deepest here, roughly 80 ingredients in one serving, which earns the 9.8 formula score, and the NSF Certified for Sport testing gives it the 9.7 I want from a daily powder. That certification tests for heavy metals and banned substances both, which matters when you are drinking this every morning. Reviewers also keep flagging its solubility as best-in-class, one tester calling it the best they have tried, which supports the 9.0 taste score. The only real knock stays the price, a bit over three dollars a serving, which is why its 7.0 value keeps it from running away with the category. Live It Up Super Greens holds second as my value pick, a 9.6 there, and it is the one I point budget-minded buyers toward when AG1's price gives them pause. Field of Greens keeps third on the strength of a 9.6 clinical-evidence score, still the choice for anyone who wants whole-food sourcing with research behind it. Huel Daily Greens stays fourth as the best formula-to-value balance, a 9.2 formula next to an 8.9 value. No rank moved this week. The category is well-mapped and no new launch or study reordered it, so I kept every score from last week rather than force motion where there was none.

en.commentary:
AG1 Next Gen stays my number one this week, and the latest round of dietitian testing keeps reinforcing why. It dissolves completely with zero clumps and almost no foam, which sounds minor until you have choked down a gritty competitor. The Next Gen reformulation leans lightly sweet instead of the usual earthy bitterness, and the roughly 80-ingredient profile is the most comprehensive on my shelf. The one honest knock is cost: at about 99 dollars a month, or 3.30 per serving, you pay a real premium for that completeness, which is why its value score stays capped.

That pricing is exactly why Live It Up Super Greens holds second. It delivers a genuinely good daily greens experience for a fraction of AG1's outlay, and for most people watching a budget it is the smarter buy. Field of Greens keeps third on the strength of its whole-food, clinically framed formula, the pick I hand to anyone who wants organic ingredients they can actually pronounce.

Huel Daily Greens stays fourth and remains my value-plus recommendation, offering a broad formula at a friendlier price than AG1. Transparent Labs and Kaged fill out the tested-and-clean tier for people who care most about third-party purity. Lower down, Amazing Grass and Nested Naturals keep earning their spots purely on price, so if you just want daily greens insurance without spending much, they still make sense. The overall picture this cycle is stable: AG1 remains the benchmark, and the value contenders keep closing the experience gap without quite matching the formula depth.

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen sets the standard
highlights.body: Around 80 ingredients, flawless mixability, and a lightly sweet taste keep it on top, with cost the only real trade-off at 3.30 per serving.

highlights.title: Live It Up is the smart-money pick
highlights.body: It delivers a genuinely good daily greens experience for a fraction of AG1's price, making it my recommendation for most budget-minded buyers.

highlights.title: Field of Greens for whole-food fans
highlights.body: Its clinically framed, organic formula is the one I hand to anyone who wants recognizable whole-food ingredients over a long additive list.

highlights.title: Huel is value-plus
highlights.body: A broad formula at a friendlier price than AG1 keeps Huel Daily Greens in fourth as the pick when you want depth without the premium.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週我還是把 AG1 Next Gen 放第一，最新一輪營養師測試又再次證明理由。它溶解得非常乾淨，幾乎不結塊、也沒什麼泡沫，這聽起來是小事，但你只要喝過那種沙沙的競品就知道差多少。Next Gen 改配方後帶點清甜，少了以前那股草腥的苦味，大約 80 種成分的配方也是我架上最完整的。唯一老實要講的缺點就是價格，一個月大概三千台幣、一份約一百塊，這份完整度是真的要付溢價，所以它的性價比分數上不去。

也正是這個價格，讓 Live It Up Super Greens 穩坐第二。它用 AG1 一小截的價錢，就給你一杯真的不錯的每日綠粉，對大多數要顧預算的人來說是更聰明的選擇。Field of Greens 靠全食物、有臨床背書的配方守著第三，是我會推薦給想要看得懂、唸得出成分的人的那一款。

Huel Daily Greens 排第四，依舊是我心中的加值型選擇，配方夠廣，價格又比 AG1 親切。Transparent Labs 和 Kaged 則填滿了重視第三方純度那一層。再往下，Amazing Grass 和 Nested Naturals 純粹靠價格站穩位置，如果你只想每天補個綠粉保險、又不想花太多，它們還是很合理。這輪整體很穩，AG1 仍是標竿，性價比對手持續拉近體驗差距，只是配方深度還沒完全追上。

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen 是標竿
highlights.body: 約 80 種成分、完美的沖泡溶解度，加上淡淡清甜，讓它穩坐第一，唯一取捨就是一份約一百塊的價格。

highlights.title: Live It Up 是聰明錢之選
highlights.body: 用 AG1 一小截的價錢就給你一杯真的不錯的每日綠粉，是我推薦給多數顧預算買家的款式。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 給全食物派
highlights.body: 有臨床背書的有機配方，是我會遞給那些想要看得懂、唸得出全食物成分而非一長串添加物的人的選擇。

highlights.title: Huel 是加值型
highlights.body: 配方夠廣、價格又比 AG1 親切，讓 Huel Daily Greens 穩守第四，是想要深度又不想付溢價時的首選。

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen keeps the top spot this week, and the reason is the same one that has held for a year: it is NSF Certified for Sport and tested at what the brand describes as 95 times the industry standard, screening for hundreds of contaminants plus banned substances. In a category where a Boston Globe feature this spring openly questioned whether greens powders even work, that verified purity is the strongest argument a product can make. AG1 is expensive, and its value score reflects that, so it is not automatically the right buy for everyone. That is where Live it Up Super Greens earns second: it delivers a genuinely likable taste and a friendly price, which matters because the best greens powder is the one you actually drink every morning. Field of Greens sits third on the strength of its whole-food, clinically-referenced formula, and Huel Daily Greens rounds out the top tier with a comprehensive ingredient deck at a fair cost per serving. My honest take after living with these: buy greens powder to plug a vegetable gap, not to replace real produce, and let third-party testing be your first filter. Amazing Grass and Nested Naturals remain the value plays if budget is the priority, while Bloom wins on taste alone. Rankings hold steady this week because nothing in the recent review cycle changed the fundamentals, testing pedigree still separates the leaders from the pack.

highlights.title: Testing is the whole game
highlights.body: AG1 stays number one on NSF Certified for Sport status and contaminant screening at 95x the industry standard. In an unregulated shelf, third-party certification is the first thing worth paying for.

highlights.title: The one you actually drink
highlights.body: Live it Up Super Greens ranks second because taste and price get it into your glass every day. A greens powder only works if the routine sticks, and mixability is underrated.

highlights.title: Formula depth at value
highlights.body: Field of Greens and Huel Daily Greens pair comprehensive, clinically-referenced formulas with reasonable cost per serving. They are the sweet spot for buyers who want substance without the premium tier price.

highlights.title: Supplement, do not replace
highlights.body: Greens powders plug a vegetable gap, they do not stand in for real produce. Treat them as insurance on busy days and buy for testing and taste, not for miracle claims.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen 這週繼續坐第一，理由跟過去一年一樣，它拿到 NSF 運動級認證，品牌說檢驗規格是業界標準的九十五倍，篩上百種污染物還有禁用成分。這個類別今年春天連波士頓環球報都寫專題質疑綠粉到底有沒有用，這時候能驗證純度就是最強的說服力。AG1 貴，這點反映在它的 CP 值分數上，所以不是每個人都適合直接入手。這就是 Live it Up Super Greens 拿第二的原因，味道真的好喝，價格也親切，這很重要，因為最好的綠粉就是你每天早上真的會泡來喝的那罐。Field of Greens 排第三，靠的是全食物加上有臨床引用的配方，Huel Daily Greens 補上第一梯隊的最後一位，成分表完整，每份成本合理。我自己喝過一輪的心得很實在，綠粉是拿來補蔬菜吃不夠的洞，不是拿來取代真正的蔬菜，第一道篩選就看第三方檢驗。Amazing Grass 跟 Nested Naturals 預算有限時是划算選擇，Bloom 純粹贏在好喝。這週排名不動，因為最近這輪評測沒有動搖基本盤，檢驗背景還是拉開領先群跟其他人的關鍵。

highlights.title: 檢驗就是一切
highlights.body: AG1 靠 NSF 運動級認證跟九十五倍業界標準的污染物篩檢守住第一。在這個沒人管的貨架上，第三方認證是第一個值得花錢的地方。

highlights.title: 你真的會喝的那罐
highlights.body: Live it Up Super Greens 拿第二，因為味道跟價格讓它每天進得了你的杯子。綠粉要有用，習慣得撐得住，好不好泡開常被低估。

highlights.title: 配方深度加 CP 值
highlights.body: Field of Greens 跟 Huel Daily Greens 把完整又有臨床引用的配方，配上合理的每份成本。想要實料又不想付頂規價的人，這裡是甜蜜點。

highlights.title: 補充而不取代
highlights.body: 綠粉是補蔬菜的缺口，不是取代真蔬菜。把它當忙碌日子的保險，買的時候看檢驗跟味道，別看那些神奇宣稱。

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen stays my number one, and the 2026 review cycle keeps handing me reasons to leave it there. It is the rare greens powder with actual clinical backing, four double-blind randomized placebo-controlled trials, plus NSF Certified for Sport status, so what is on the label is what lands in your glass. Seventy-five vitamins, minerals, probiotics and adaptogens in one earthy, vanilla-tinged scoop that mixes clean. The one honest knock is price, roughly $3.30 a serving, and that is why value stays its weakest number at 7.0. That gap is the whole reason the rest of this list exists. Live it Up Super Greens holds second because it delivers a genuinely good daily greens experience for a fraction of AG1's cost, which is why it scores a 9.6 on value, the highest here. Field of Greens keeps third on the strength of its whole-food, clinically referenced formula that appeals to people who want researched ingredients over a long proprietary blend. Huel Daily Greens rounds out the strong tier with a comprehensive formula at a fair price. If you are an athlete or filling real nutrient gaps, AG1 is worth it. If you just want daily greens insurance, the value picks below it do the job for less.

highlights.title: AG1 earns the top on evidence
highlights.body: Four double-blind RCTs and NSF Certified for Sport put AG1 in rare company. That is why it holds number one even at a premium price.

highlights.title: Live it Up is the value champion
highlights.body: A 9.6 on value, the highest on this list. It delivers a solid daily greens routine for a small fraction of AG1's per-serving cost.

highlights.title: Field of Greens for the ingredient readers
highlights.body: Its whole-food, clinically referenced formula wins with buyers who want to recognize and research every ingredient on the label.

highlights.title: Match the pick to your need
highlights.body: Athletes and those with real nutrient gaps get AG1's money's worth. Everyone else can get daily greens coverage for less further down.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen續坐我的第一名，2026這一輪評測一直給我理由把它留在那。它是少數真的有臨床背書的綠粉，四個雙盲隨機安慰劑對照試驗，再加上NSF Certified for Sport認證，標示寫什麼，倒進杯子裡的就是什麼。75種維生素、礦物質、益生菌跟適應原全塞進一匙，帶點泥土味跟香草甜，沖起來很好溶。老實說唯一被嫌的就是價格，一份大概台幣一百出頭，所以划算度只有7.0，是它最弱的一項。這個空隙正是清單其他名次存在的意義。Live it Up Super Greens排第二，因為它用AG1零頭的價格就給你一杯很像樣的每日綠粉，划算度9.6是全場最高。Field of Greens守第三，靠的是全食物、有臨床引用的配方，很對那種寧願看得懂成分也不要一長串專利複方的人胃口。Huel Daily Greens配方完整、價格合理，穩穩收進第一梯隊。你如果是運動員或真的有營養缺口，AG1花得值。只是想買個每日綠粉保險，下面那幾款划算選手就夠用了。

highlights.title: AG1靠證據拿第一
highlights.body: 四個雙盲RCT加NSF Certified for Sport認證，讓AG1站在少數位置。就算貴,它照樣坐穩第一。

highlights.title: Live it Up是划算王
highlights.body: 划算度9.6全場最高。用AG1一份零頭的價格，就給你一套紮實的每日綠粉習慣。

highlights.title: Field of Greens給看成分的人
highlights.body: 全食物、有臨床引用的配方，很得那種每個成分都想看懂、想查一下的買家的心。

highlights.title: 照需求挑
highlights.body: 運動員跟真的有營養缺口的人，AG1花得值。其他人往下看那幾款,花更少就有每日綠粉保障。

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen keeps my top spot this week, and the newest tester reviews explain why. The formula is the most comprehensive on the market, covering vitamins, minerals, whole-food nutrients, adaptogens and probiotics in one scoop, and the Next Gen update finally fixed the two things people complained about. Reviewers now describe a light sweetness that goes down easy instead of the old earthy bitterness, and the powder dissolves completely with zero clumps. That solubility and taste jump is real, and it is why AG1 stays the athlete's pick despite the premium price. Live it Up Super Greens holds second as my best-value call. At around 40 dollars a month it delivers a genuinely useful greens blend for roughly half what AG1 costs, and for most casual users that trade is smart. Field of Greens sits third because it leans hardest into clinical evidence and whole-food sourcing, which appeals to buyers who want research behind every ingredient. The honest read this week is that AG1's lead is about completeness, not necessity. If you are logging serious training miles or lifting heavy, the full micronutrient coverage genuinely supports recovery and justifies the spend. If you just want a daily greens habit, Live it Up or Amazing Grass deliver most of the benefit for far less. My advice: buy AG1 Next Gen if comprehensive coverage and the improved taste matter to you, choose Live it Up to save money without giving up much, and look at Field of Greens if clinical backing is your deciding factor.

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen fixed taste and mixability
highlights.body: Reviewers now report a light sweetness and zero clumps, resolving the earthy bitterness and solubility complaints that dogged the old formula.

highlights.title: Live it Up is the value pick
highlights.body: At around 40 dollars a month it delivers a useful greens blend for roughly half AG1's price, a smart trade for casual daily users.

highlights.title: Field of Greens leads on evidence
highlights.body: Its heavy lean into clinical research and whole-food sourcing appeals to buyers who want studies behind every ingredient.

highlights.title: AG1's edge is completeness, not necessity
highlights.body: Full micronutrient coverage genuinely supports heavy training and recovery, but casual users get most of the benefit from cheaper options.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen 這週還是我的第一，最新的實測評論也解釋了原因。它的配方是市面上最完整的，一匙就涵蓋維生素、礦物質、全食物營養、適應原跟益生菌，而且 Next Gen 這次改版終於把大家抱怨的兩件事修好了。評測現在形容它帶點淡淡的甜味，很好入口，不像以前那種土味苦澀，粉末也完全溶解、零結塊。這個溶解度跟口味的躍進是真的，也是 AG1 就算價格偏高、還是運動族首選的原因。Live it Up Super Greens 穩坐第二，是我心中最超值的選擇。一個月大概台幣一千二，就給你一款真的有用的綠色蔬果粉，價格差不多是 AG1 的一半，對多數輕度使用者來說這筆帳很划算。Field of Greens 排第三，因為它最主打臨床實證跟全食物來源，很吸引想要每個成分都有研究撐腰的人。這週老實說，AG1 的領先是贏在「完整」，不是「必需」。如果你正在認真練跑量或重訓，這種全面的微量營養覆蓋確實幫助恢復，這錢花得值。如果你只是想養成每天喝綠拿鐵的習慣，Live it Up 或 Amazing Grass 用少很多的錢就給你大部分好處。建議：在意完整覆蓋跟改善後的口味就買 AG1 Next Gen，想省錢又不想犧牲太多選 Live it Up，臨床背書是你的決勝點就看 Field of Greens。

highlights.title: AG1 Next Gen 修好了口味跟溶解
highlights.body: 評測現在說它帶點淡甜、零結塊，解決了舊配方的土味苦澀跟溶解度問題。

highlights.title: Live it Up 是超值選擇
highlights.body: 一個月約台幣一千二就有實用的蔬果粉，價格約 AG1 一半，對輕度日常使用者很划算。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 贏在實證
highlights.body: 主打臨床研究跟全食物來源，很吸引想要每個成分都有研究撐腰的人。

highlights.title: AG1 贏在完整，不是必需
highlights.body: 全面微量營養覆蓋確實幫助重訓與恢復，但輕度使用者用便宜選項就能拿到大部分好處。

references.title: The Best Greens Powder of 2026: Tested and Approved
AG1 Review, 2026: A Dietitian's Take and Our Tester's Review
10 Best Greens Powders, Tested by Dietitians (2026)

en.commentary: AG1 Next Gen holds first for another week, and the reviews that landed this cycle reinforce why. Fortune's team tested fourteen greens powders and still called AG1 Next Gen the best overall, crediting its 83 ingredient formula and, crucially, its NSF Certified for Sport status, which means a third party verified the label and screened for banned substances. That certification is the single most important thing I look for in this category, because a greens powder you drink every morning is only as good as the trust behind what is actually in the scoop. Testers also keep rating its mixability and taste near the top, which sounds minor until you realize the best formula is worthless if you quit drinking it. The honest knock stays the price, around $3.30 a serving on subscription, and that is why AG1 carries the lowest value score at the top of my table. That opening is exactly what keeps Live It Up Super Greens at second, delivering a genuinely good daily greens for a fraction of the cost. Field of Greens holds third on the strength of the best clinical-evidence score here. My guidance is steady: if certification and a complete formula matter most, AG1 is worth the premium, and if your budget leads, Live It Up gives you most of the benefit for far less.

highlights.title: AG1 keeps the crown on certification
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport plus an 83 ingredient formula is why Fortune's fourteen-powder test still named it best overall, and why it holds first here.

highlights.title: Certification is what I trust
highlights.body: A greens you drink daily is only as good as the third-party verification behind the scoop, which is the single factor I weigh most heavily.

highlights.title: Price keeps the door open
highlights.body: At around $3.30 a serving AG1 carries the lowest value score up top, which is exactly why Live It Up holds a strong second.

highlights.title: Field of Greens leads on evidence
highlights.body: The best clinical-evidence score on the board keeps it at third for buyers who want research behind the ingredients.

zh-tw.commentary: AG1 Next Gen 再守一週的第一，這一輪出來的評測也把理由講得更實。Fortune 團隊測了十四款綠粉，還是把 AG1 Next Gen 點名為整體最佳，看中的是它 83 種成分的配方，還有最關鍵的 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，代表有第三方驗過標示、篩過禁用物質。這張認證是我在這個類別最重視的一件事，因為一款你每天早上都要喝的綠粉，好壞完全取決於那一勺裡到底裝了什麼、值不值得信。測試者也一直把它的沖泡溶解度跟口味評在前段班，這聽起來像小事，直到你發現配方再好，喝不下去就等於零。老實說扣分的還是價格，訂閱一份大約台幣一百塊上下，這也是 AG1 在我榜單頂端價值分數最低的原因。這個空間正好讓 Live It Up Super Greens 守住第二，用零頭的價格給你一款真的不錯的日常綠粉。Field of Greens 靠這裡最高的臨床實證分數守在第三。我的建議很穩，最在意認證跟完整配方的話，AG1 值得那個溢價，預算優先的話，Live It Up 用低很多的價格給你大部分的好處。

highlights.title: AG1 靠認證戴冠
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport 加上 83 種成分配方，讓 Fortune 十四款試喝還是選它整體最佳，也讓它在這裡守住第一。

highlights.title: 認證是我信任的關鍵
highlights.body: 每天喝的綠粉，好壞取決於那一勺背後的第三方驗證，這是我權重壓得最重的單一因子。

highlights.title: 價格留了一道門縫
highlights.body: 一份約台幣一百塊上下，讓 AG1 在頂端價值分數最低，這正是 Live It Up 能守住強勢第二的原因。

highlights.title: Field of Greens 實證領先
highlights.body: 全榜最高的臨床實證分數，讓它守在第三，適合想要成分背後有研究撐腰的人。
